title: ophrys × cugniensis
intro: Ophrys × cugniensis, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a hybrid orchid plant that belongs to the Ophrys genus. It is known for its unique and fragrant flowers that mimic the appearance and scent of female bees, attracting male bees for pollination. The Bee Orchid has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and its health benefits include relieving respiratory issues and reducing stress, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.
